one_liner: Trip.com helps travelers compare and book flights, hotels, trains, and travel packages in one place.
target_audience: Users who want flights and hotels in one workflow
differentiators: One-stop travel booking across flights, hotels, and transport
proof_points: Supports flights, hotels, trains, car rentals, and packages
Global travel inventory and multilingual support
Designed for mobile-first travel planning and booking
core_messages: The value is convenience across the whole booking journey
Comparison and booking should happen in one place
Users care about trust, pricing clarity, and workflow simplicity
preferred_cta: Encourage readers to compare their current booking workflow, shortlist the apps that best fit their trip style, and then test the one that saves them the most friction.
prohibited_claims: Do not claim lowest price guarantees without support
Do not claim every route or hotel is covered
Do not use unsupported best-in-market language
